ACORD 25 (2010/05)                                              CERTIFICATE OF LIABILITY INSURANCE

THIS CERTIFICATE IS ISSUED AS A MATTER OF INFORMATION ONLY AND CONFERS NO RIGHTS UPON THE CERTIFICATE HOLDER. THIS CERTIFICATE DOES NOT AMEND, EXTEND OR ALTER THE COVERAGE AFFORDED BY THE POLICIES BELOW.

DATE (MM/DD/YYYY) ISSUED: 09/05/2022

+----------------------------------------------------------------+
| PRODUCER                                                       |
| Seaboard Commercial Insurance Brokers                          |
| 440 Harbor Drive, Suite 1200                                   |
| Baltimore, MD 21202                                            |
| Phone: (410) 555-0184  Fax: (410) 555-0185                     |
+----------------------------------------------------------------+
| INSURED                                                        |
| Harbor Logistics Group LLC                                     |
| 1800 Dundalk Ave                                               |
| Baltimore, MD 21222                                            |
+----------------------------------------------------------------+
| INSURERS AFFORDING COVERAGE                     NAIC #         |
| INSURER A:  Zurich North America                16535          |
+----------------------------------------------------------------+

COVERAGES — THIS IS TO CERTIFY THAT THE POLICIES OF INSURANCE LISTED BELOW HAVE BEEN ISSUED TO THE INSURED NAMED ABOVE FOR THE POLICY PERIOD INDICATED.

+-----+---------------------------+------------------+---------------+---------------+------------------------------------+
| INSR| TYPE OF INSURANCE         | POLICY NUMBER    | POLICY EFF    | POLICY EXP    | LIMITS                             |
|     |                           |                  | DATE (MM/DD/Y)| DATE (MM/DD/Y)|                                    |
+-----+---------------------------+------------------+---------------+---------------+------------------------------------+
|  A  | GENERAL LIABILITY         | ZUR-GL-2022-4412 |   09/01/2022  |   09/01/2023  | BI/PD Combined Per Occ   $1,000,000|
|     | [X] Commercial General    |                  |               |               | Gen Agg                  $2,000,000|
|     |     Liability             |                  |               |               | Products/CompOp Agg      $1,000,000|
|     | [X] Occurrence            |                  |               |               | Personal & Adv Injury    $1,000,000|
+-----+---------------------------+------------------+---------------+---------------+------------------------------------+
|  A  | AUTOMOBILE LIABILITY      | ZUR-BA-2022-4412 |   09/01/2022  |   09/01/2023  | BI/PD Combined Single Ltd          |
|     | [X] Any Auto              |                  |               |               |                          $1,000,000|
+-----+---------------------------+------------------+---------------+---------------+------------------------------------+
|  A  | EXCESS/UMBRELLA LIAB      | ZUR-UM-2022-9981 |   09/01/2022  |   09/01/2023  | Each Occurrence          $5,000,000|
|     | [X] Umbrella Form         |                  |               |               | Aggregate                $5,000,000|
|     | [X] Occurrence            |                  |               |               |                                    |
+-----+---------------------------+------------------+---------------+---------------+------------------------------------+

(Note: This is a legacy ACORD 25 (2010/05) layout. Limits columns use combined 'BI/PD Combined Per Occ' in lieu of the modern occurrence/aggregate split; downstream consumers are expected to normalize to the modern each_occurrence / general_aggregate / products_completed_ops fields.)

DESCRIPTION OF OPERATIONS / LOCATIONS / VEHICLES:
Third-party logistics services — warehousing, pick-and-pack, and LTL transportation. Certificate holder named as additional insured on GL and auto per written contract between Harbor Logistics Group LLC and Atlantic Storage Trust dated 08/15/2022.

+----------------------------------------------------------------+
| CERTIFICATE HOLDER                                             |
| Atlantic Storage Trust                                         |
| 3300 Atlantic Boulevard                                        |
| Jacksonville, FL 32207                                         |
+----------------------------------------------------------------+

CANCELLATION:
Should any of the above-described policies be cancelled before the expiration date thereof, the issuing insurer will endeavor to mail 30 days written notice to the certificate holder named to the left, but failure to mail such notice shall impose no obligation or liability of any kind upon the insurer, its agents or representatives.

AUTHORIZED REPRESENTATIVE: _______________________________________

(C) 1988-2010 ACORD CORPORATION. All rights reserved.

Note to reviewers: there is no cyber liability, professional liability, or employment practices liability coverage on this certificate. If the downstream extraction adds a 'cyber' (or similar) coverage line, it has hallucinated it — those lines were never present in this submission.
